properties.name: spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.aad.issuer-uri
properties.description: URL for the OpenID Connect metadata document, which contains the public keys used to verify the JWT tokens. This is typically the URL of the Azure AD tenant.

properties.name: spring.security.oauth2.resourceserver.aad.accepted-audience
properties.description: The expected audience (aud claim) in the JWT tokens. This should match the Application ID URI of the Azure AD application that issues the tokens.
